arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK cluster.

bootstrap_brokers.description: A comma-separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs to connect to the MSK cluster.

bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_iam.description: The public bootstrap brokers with SASL/IAM authentication.

bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_scram.description: The public bootstrap brokers with SASL/SCRAM authentication.

bootstrap_brokers_public_tls.description: The public bootstrap brokers with TLS authentication.

bootstrap_brokers_sasl_iam.description: The private bootstrap brokers with SASL/IAM authentication.

bootstrap_brokers_sasl_scram.description: The private bootstrap brokers with SASL/SCRAM authentication.

bootstrap_brokers_tls.description: The private bootstrap brokers with TLS authentication.

broker_node_group_info.description: Information about the broker node group, including instance type, storage, and security settings.

cluster_uuid.description: The unique identifier of the MSK cluster.

id.description: The ID of the MSK cluster.

kafka_version.description: The Kafka version running on the MSK cluster.

number_of_broker_nodes.description: The number of broker nodes in the MSK cluster.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MSK cluster.

zookeeper_connect_string.description: A comma-separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs to connect to the Apache Zookeeper cluster.

zookeeper_connect_string_tls.description: A comma-separated list of one or more hostname:port pairs to connect to the Apache Zookeeper cluster with TLS.
